sizeComparison.errorHeadline: Your model is 17% bigger than max
sizeComparison.errorBody: For the best performance of your character, we limit character size.
sizeComparison.fixBody: 17% reduced model will meet the criteria while your model is still big as you wanted. Tap individual to accept itemized fix or all fixes with button below.

cageNameFixes.foundChip: Two right arm was found, lower case
Two right arm was found, lower case

cageNameCopy.errorHeadline: Duplicated names and lower case caused errors
cageNameCopy.fixHeadline: Title case and assign name to corresponding parts
cageNameCopy.fixBody: Naming parts correct with right naming convention allows Roblox to function your character right without friction. You can accept fix individually via check box or accept all with the button below
